<content>1: package router
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"context"
5: 	"crypto/rand"
6: 	"crypto/rsa"
7: 	"crypto/x509"
8: 	"encoding/pem"
9: 	"fmt"
10: 	"os"
11: 	"time"
12: 
13: 	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
14: 	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
15: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
16: 	metav1 "k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1"
17: 	"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes"
18: 	"k8s.io/client-go/rest"
19: 	"k8s.io/klog/v2"
20: )
21: 
22: const (
23: 	IdentitySecretName = "picod-router-identity"
24: 	PrivateKeyDataKey  = "private.pem"
25: 	PublicKeyDataKey   = "public.pem"
26: 	KeySize            = 2048
27: )
28: 
29: type JWTManager struct {
30: 	privateKey *rsa.PrivateKey
31: 	publicKey  *rsa.PublicKey
32: 	clientset  kubernetes.Interface
33: }
34: 
35: func NewJWTManager() (*JWTManager, error) {
36: 	config, err := rest.InClusterConfig()
37: 	if err != nil {
38: 		klog.Info("Not running in cluster, JWT keys must be provided via environment")
39: 		return &JWTManager{}, nil
40: 	}
41: 
42: 	clientset, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(config)
43: 	if err != nil {
44: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create kubernetes client: %w", err)
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	return &JWTManager{
48: 		clientset: clientset,
49: 	}, nil
50: }
51: 
52: func (jm *JWTManager) GenerateToken(claims map[string]interface{}) (string, error) {
53: 	if jm.privateKey == nil {
54: 		return "", fmt.Errorf("private key not loaded")
55: 	}
56: 
57: 	jwtClaims := jwt.MapClaims{}
58: 	for k, v := range claims {
59: 		jwtClaims[k] = v
60: 	}
61: 	jwtClaims["iat"] = time.Now().Unix()
62: 	jwtClaims["exp"] = time.Now().Add(time.Hour).Unix()
63: 
64: 	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, jwtClaims)
65: 	return token.SignedString(jm.privateKey)
66: }
67: 
68: func (jm *JWTManager) ValidateToken(tokenString string) (*jwt.Token, error) {
69: 	if jm.publicKey == nil {
70: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("public key not loaded")
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	return jwt.Parse(tokenString, func(token *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
74: 		if _, ok := token.Method.(*jwt.SigningMethodRSA); !ok {
75: 			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unexpected signing method: %v", token.Header["alg"])
76: 		}
77: 		return jm.publicKey, nil
78: 	}, jwt.WithExpirationRequired(), jwt.WithIssuedAt(), jwt.WithLeeway(time.Minute))
79: }
80: 
81: func (jm *JWTManager) TryStoreOrLoadJWTKeySecret(ctx context.Context) error {
82: 	if jm.clientset == nil {
83: 		return jm.loadKeysFromEnv()
84: 	}
85: 
86: 	namespace := os.Getenv("AGENTCUBE_NAMESPACE")
87: 	if namespace == "" {
88: 		namespace = "default"
89: 	}
90: 
91: 	secret, err := jm.clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(namespace).Get(ctx, IdentitySecretName, metav1.GetOptions{})
92: 	if err != nil {
93: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
94: 			return jm.createKeySecret(ctx, namespace)
95: 		}
96: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to get identity secret: %w", err)
97: 	}
98: 
99: 	return jm.loadKeysFromSecret(secret)
100: }
101: 
102: func (jm *JWTManager) createKeySecret(ctx context.Context, namespace string) error {
103: 	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, KeySize)
104: 	if err != nil {
105: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to generate private key: %w", err)
106: 	}
107: 
108: 	privateKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
109: 		Type:  "RSA PRIVATE KEY",
110: 		Bytes: x509.MarshalPKCS1PrivateKey(privateKey),
111: 	})
112: 
113: 	publicKeyPEM := pem.EncodeToMemory(&pem.Block{
114: 		Type:  "RSA PUBLIC KEY",
115: 		Bytes: x509.MarshalPKCS1PublicKey(&privateKey.PublicKey),
116: 	})
117: 
118: 	secret := &corev1.Secret{
119: 		ObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{
120: 			Name:      IdentitySecretName,
121: 			Namespace: namespace,
122: 		},
123: 		Type: corev1.SecretTypeOpaque,
124: 		Data: map[string][]byte{
125: 			PrivateKeyDataKey: privateKeyPEM,
126: 			PublicKeyDataKey:  publicKeyPEM,
127: 		},
128: 	}
129: 
130: 	_, err = jm.clientset.CoreV1().Secrets(namespace).Create(ctx, secret, metav1.CreateOptions{})
131: 	if err != nil {
132: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to create identity secret: %w", err)
133: 	}
134: 
135: 	jm.privateKey = privateKey
136: 	jm.publicKey = &privateKey.PublicKey
137: 	klog.Infof("Created identity secret %s in namespace %s", IdentitySecretName, namespace)
138: 	return nil
139: }
140: 
141: func (jm *JWTManager) loadKeysFromSecret(secret *corev1.Secret) error {
142: 	privateKeyPEM, ok := secret.Data[PrivateKeyDataKey]
143: 	if !ok {
144: 		return fmt.Errorf("private key not found in secret")
145: 	}
146: 
147: 	publicKeyPEM, ok := secret.Data[PublicKeyDataKey]
148: 	if !ok {
149: 		return fmt.Errorf("public key not found in secret")
150: 	}
151: 
152: 	privateKeyBlock, _ := pem.Decode(privateKeyPEM)
153: 	if privateKeyBlock == nil {
154: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to decode private key PEM")
155: 	}
156: 
157: 	privateKey, err := x509.ParsePKCS1PrivateKey(privateKeyBlock.Bytes)
158: 	if err != nil {
159: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse private key: %w", err)
160: 	}
161: 
162: 	publicKeyBlock, _ := pem.Decode(publicKeyPEM)
163: 	if publicKeyBlock == nil {
164: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to decode public key PEM")
165: 	}
166: 
167: 	publicKey, err := x509.ParsePKCS1PublicKey(publicKeyBlock.Bytes)
168: 	if err != nil {
169: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse public key: %w", err)
170: 	}
171: 
172: 	jm.privateKey = privateKey
173: 	jm.publicKey = publicKey
174: 	klog.Info("Loaded JWT keys from secret")
175: 	return nil
176: }
177: 
178: func (jm *JWTManager) loadKeysFromEnv() error {
179: 	privateKeyPEM := os.Getenv("PICOD_AUTH_PRIVATE_KEY")
180: 	publicKeyPEM := os.Getenv("PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY")
181: 
182: 	if privateKeyPEM == "" || publicKeyPEM == "" {
183: 		return fmt.Errorf("PICOD_AUTH_PRIVATE_KEY and PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY must be set when not running in cluster")
184: 	}
185: 
186: 	privateKeyBlock, _ := pem.Decode([]byte(privateKeyPEM))
187: 	if privateKeyBlock == nil {
188: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to decode private key PEM from env")
189: 	}
190: 
191: 	privateKey, err := x509.ParsePKCS1PrivateKey(privateKeyBlock.Bytes)
192: 	if err != nil {
193: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse private key: %w", err)
194: 	}
195: 
196: 	publicKeyBlock, _ := pem.Decode([]byte(publicKeyPEM))
197: 	if publicKeyBlock == nil {
198: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to decode public key PEM from env")
199: 	}
200: 
201: 	publicKey, err := x509.ParsePKCS1PublicKey(publicKeyBlock.Bytes)
202: 	if err != nil {
203: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse public key: %w", err)
204: 	}
205: 
206: 	jm.privateKey = privateKey
207: 	jm.publicKey = publicKey
208: 	klog.Info("Loaded JWT keys from environment")
209: 	return nil
210: }
211: 
212: func (jm *JWTManager) GetPublicKey() *rsa.PublicKey {
213: 	return jm.publicKey
214: }

29: func TestJWTManager_GenerateAndValidateToken(t *testing.T) {
30: 	// Generate a test key pair

32: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
33:

43: 
44: 	// Validate token
45: 	claims, err := manager.ValidateToken(token)
46: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
47: 	assert.NotNil(t, claims)
48: 	assert.Equal(t, "test-sandbox", claims.SandboxID)
49: 	assert.Equal(t, "test-session", claims.SessionID)
50: }

71: 	assert.NoError(t, err)

73: 	manager := &JWTManager{

85: 		},

14: type Proxy struct {
15: 	sandbox    *types.SandboxInfo
16: 	jwtManager *JWTManager
17: 	transport  *http.Transport
18: }
19: 
20: func NewProxy(sandbox *types.SandboxInfo, jwtManager *JWTManager) *Proxy {
21: 	return &Proxy{
22: 		sandbox:    sandbox,
23: 		jwtManager: jwtManager,
24: 		transport: &http.Transport{
25: 			MaxIdleConns:        100,
26: 			MaxIdleConnsPerHost: 10,
27: 			IdleConnTimeout:     90 * time.Second,
28: 		},
29: 	}
30: }
31: 
32: func (p *Proxy) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, path string) {
33: 	if len(p.sandbox.EntryPoints) == 0 {
34: 		http.Error(w, `{"error":"no entry point found for sandbox"}`, http.StatusNotFound)
35: 		return
36: 	}
37: 
38: 	entryPoint := p.findEntryPoint(path)
39: 	if entryPoint == nil {
40: 		entryPoint = &p.sandbox.EntryPoints[0]
41: 	}
42: 
43: 	targetURL, err := p.buildTargetURL(entryPoint)
44: 	if err != nil {
45: 		klog.Errorf("Failed to build target URL: %v", err)
46: 		http.Error(w, `{"error":"failed to build target URL"}`, http.StatusInternalServerError)
47: 		return
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	director := func(req *http.Request) {
51: 		req.URL.Scheme = targetURL.Scheme
52: 		req.URL.Host = targetURL.Host
53: 		req.Host = targetURL.Host
54: 
55: 		if path != "" {
56: 			if !strings.HasPrefix(path, "/") {
57: 				path = "/" + path
58: 			}
59: 			req.URL.Path = path
60: 		}
61: 
62: 		req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-Host", r.Host)
63: 		if r.TLS != nil {
64: 			req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-Proto", "https")
65: 		} else {
66: 			req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-Proto", "http")
67: 		}
68: 
69: 		clientIP := r.RemoteAddr
70: 		if idx := strings.LastIndex(clientIP, ":"); idx != -1 {
71: 			clientIP = clientIP[:idx]
72: 		}
73: 		if prior := req.Header.Get("X-Forwarded-For"); prior != "" {
74: 			clientIP = prior + ", " + clientIP
75: 		}
76: 		req.Header.Set("X-Forwarded-For", clientIP)
77: 
78: 		if p.sandbox.Kind == types.SandboxKind || p.sandbox.Kind == types.SandboxClaimsKind {
79: 			token, err := p.jwtManager.GenerateToken(map[string]interface{}{
80: 				"session_id": p.sandbox.SessionID,
81: 				"sandbox_id": p.sandbox.SandboxID,
82: 			})
83: 			if err != nil {
84: 				klog.Errorf("Failed to generate JWT: %v", err)
85: 				return
86: 			}
87: 			req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+token)
88: 		}
89: 	}
90: 
91: 	errorHandler := func(rw http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request, err error) {
92: 		klog.Errorf("Proxy error: %v", err)
93: 		if strings.Contains(err.Error(), "connection refused") {
94: 			http.Error(rw, `{"error":"sandbox unreachable"}`, http.StatusBadGateway)
95: 		} else if strings.Contains(err.Error(), "timeout") {
96: 			http.Error(rw, `{"error":"sandbox timeout"}`, http.StatusGatewayTimeout)
97: 		} else {
98: 			http.Error(rw, `{"error":"sandbox unreachable"}`, http.StatusBadGateway)
99: 		}
100: 	}
101: 
102: 	proxy := &httputil.ReverseProxy{
103: 		Director:       director,
104: 		Transport:      p.transport,
105: 		ErrorHandler:   errorHandler,
106: 		ModifyResponse: p.modifyResponse,
107: 	}
108: 
109: 	proxy.ServeHTTP(w, r)
110: }
111: 
112: func (p *Proxy) findEntryPoint(path string) *types.SandboxEntryPoint {
113: 	for _, ep := range p.sandbox.EntryPoints {
114: 		if ep.Path != "" && strings.HasPrefix(path, ep.Path) {
115: 			return &ep
116: 		}
117: 	}
118: 	return nil
119: }
120: 
121: func (p *Proxy) buildTargetURL(entryPoint *types.SandboxEntryPoint) (*url.URL, error) {
122: 	endpoint := entryPoint.Endpoint
123: 	if entryPoint.Protocol != "" && !strings.Contains(endpoint, "://") {
124: 		endpoint = strings.ToLower(string(entryPoint.Protocol)) + "://" + endpoint
125: 	}
126: 
127: 	return url.Parse(endpoint)
128: }

131: 	resp.Header.Set("x-agentcube-session-id", p.sandbox.SessionID)

133: }

39: 	SandboxID string `json:"sandboxId"`

43: 	Name string `json:"name"`
44: 	// EntryPoints are the available entry points
45: 	EntryPoints []SandboxEntryPoint `json:"entryPoints"`
46: 	// SessionID is the unique session identifier
47: 	SessionID string `json:"sessionId"`
48: 	// CreatedAt is the creation timestamp
49: 	CreatedAt time.Time `json:"createdAt"`
50: 	// ExpiresAt is the expiry timestamp
51: 	ExpiresAt time.Time `json:"expiresAt"`
52: 	// Status is the sandbox status
53: 	Status string `json:"status"`
54: }

29: func TestJWTManager_GenerateAndValidateToken(t *testing.T) {
30: 	// Generate a test key pair
31: 	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
32: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
33: 
34: 	manager := &JWTManager{
35: 		privateKey: privateKey,
36: 		publicKey:  &privateKey.PublicKey,
37: 	}
38: 
39: 	// Generate token with map claims
40: 	token, err := manager.GenerateToken(map[string]interface{}{
41: 		"sandbox_id": "test-sandbox",
42: 		"session_id": "test-session",
43: 	})
44: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
45: 	assert.NotEmpty(t, token)
46: 
47: 	// Validate token
48: 	validatedToken, err := manager.ValidateToken(token)
49: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
50: 	assert.NotNil(t, validatedToken)
51: 
52: 	// Extract claims
53: 	if claims, ok := validatedToken.Claims.(jwt.MapClaims); ok {
54: 		assert.Equal(t, "test-sandbox", claims["sandbox_id"])
55: 		assert.Equal(t, "test-session", claims["session_id"])
56: 	} else {
57: 		t.Error("Failed to extract claims")
58: 	}
59: }
60: 
61: func TestJWTManager_ValidateToken_Invalid(t *testing.T) {
62: 	// Generate a test key pair
63: 	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
64: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
65: 
66: 	manager := &JWTManager{
67: 		privateKey: privateKey,
68: 		publicKey:  &privateKey.PublicKey,
69: 	}
70: 
71: 	// Validate invalid token
72: 	claims, err := manager.ValidateToken("invalid-token")
73: 	assert.Error(t, err)
74: 	assert.Nil(t, claims)
75: }
76: 
77: func TestJWTManager_ValidateToken_Expired(t *testing.T) {
78: 	// Generate a test key pair
79: 	privateKey, err := rsa.GenerateKey(rand.Reader, 2048)
80: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
81: 
82: 	manager := &JWTManager{
83: 		privateKey: privateKey,
84: 		publicKey:  &privateKey.PublicKey,
85: 	}
86: 
87: 	// Create expired token manually
88: 	claims := &SandboxClaims{
89: 		SandboxID: "test-sandbox",
90: 		SessionID: "test-session",
91: 		RegisteredClaims: jwt.RegisteredClaims{
92: 			ExpiresAt: jwt.NewNumericDate(time.Now().Add(-time.Hour)),
93: 			IssuedAt:  jwt.NewNumericDate(time.Now().Add(-2 * time.Hour)),
94: 		},
95: 	}
96: 
97: 	token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, claims)
98: 	tokenString, err := token.SignedString(privateKey)
99: 	assert.NoError(t, err)
100: 
101: 	// Validate expired token
102: 	validatedClaims, err := manager.ValidateToken(tokenString)
103: 	assert.Error(t, err)
104: 	assert.Nil(t, validatedClaims)
105: }

107: func TestJWTManager_ExtractTokenFromHeader(t *testing.T) {
108: 	manager := &JWTManager{}
